channel.title: briefUpdatesBreakingOffshootNL
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from briefUpdatesBreakingOffshootNL, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Only a fraction of House seats are competitive. Redistricting is driving that lower
item.description: Primary voters in a small number of districts play an outsized role in deciding who wins Congress. The Trump-initiated mid-decade redistricting is dri...

item.title: Inside Iran’s Preparations for War and Plans for Survival
item.description: Ayatollah Ali Khamenei has entrusted Ali Larijani, the top national security official, to ensure the Islamic Republic endures any military attacks and...

item.title: Newsom, Targeting Red States, Kicks Off Book Tour in Nashville
item.description: Scores of Californians have moved to Tennessee for its friendlier business environment and conservative politics. On Saturday, the Democratic governor...

item.title: The Ex-Taxi Driver at the Center of Russia’s Shadow War
item.description: The Kremlin’s sabotage campaign against European allies of Ukraine has been escalating. It needs people like Aleksei Kolosovsky, 42, to carry it out.

item.title: Crews recover bodies of all 9 skiers killed in California avalanche
item.description: The bodies of all the skiers who died in Tuesday's avalanche near Lake Tahoe have been recovered, authorities said Saturday. Intense winter storm cond...

item.title: They Did Deals With Trump to Get Lower Tariffs. Now They Are Stuck.
item.description: Countries that under the threat of tariffs made commitments like enormous investment pledges face the reality that they may have been better off waiti...

item.title: At Least 15 Have Died on Tahoe-Area Slopes This Year
item.description: Three more skiers have died in the Lake Tahoe area since the deadliest avalanche in California history on Tuesday killed nine.

item.title: Homeland Security suspends TSA PreCheck and Global Entry airport security programs
item.description: The U.S. Department of Homeland Security is suspending the TSA PreCheck and Global Entry airport security programs as a partial government shutdown co...

item.title: Inside Iran’s Preparations for War and Plans for Survival
item.description: Ayatollah Ali Khamenei has entrusted Ali Larijani, the top national security official, to ensure the Islamic Republic endures any military attacks and...

item.title: Trump Looks Ahead to Summit With China’s Xi, but Tariffs and Taiwan Loom
item.description: President Trump said his planned meeting with President Xi Jinping would be a grand display, but tensions over trade and defense could dampen the mood...

item.title: Fat Signing Bonuses, and Concierge Service, for Family Doctors
item.description: In a country where a quarter of the population lacks a family doctor, Canadian communities compete in a zero-sum battle to recruit family doctors.

item.title: Johannes Hoesflot Klaebo Leads Norway to Record Olympic Medal Haul
item.description: Norway, led by the cross-country skiing sensation Johannes Hoesflot Klaebo, topped the medal table for the fourth straight Winter Games.

item.title: The Ex-Taxi Driver at the Center of Russia’s Shadow War
item.description: The Kremlin’s sabotage campaign against European allies of Ukraine has been escalating. It needs people like Aleksei Kolosovsky, 42, to carry it out.

item.title: NASA's Artemis II lunar mission may not launch in March after all
item.description: NASA says an "interrupted flow" of helium to the rocket system could require a rollback to the Vehicle Assembly Building. If it happens, NASA says the...

item.title: FCC calls for more 'patriotic, pro-America' programming in run-up to 250th anniversary
item.description: The "Pledge America Campaign" urges broadcasters to focus on programming that highlights "the historic accomplishments of this great nation from our f...
